title: Recall Potion & Magic Mirror
body:
This datapack adds **Magic Mirror** and **Recall Potion** from Terraria, These items make it easy to teleport back to your spawn point, no matter where you are—even across dimensions ( custom dimensions included ).

# How It Works

- Set your spawn point using a Bed or Respawn Anchor.
- Use the Magic Mirror by right-clicking or drink the Recall Potion to instantly teleport back to your spawn point.
- The items won’t work if no spawn point is set.

# How to Obtain

- Both items can be found in treasure chests.
- **Recall Potion Recipe**:
    - 1 Ender Pearl or Chorus Fruit
    - 1 Phantom Membrane
    - 1 Honey Bottle or Water Bottle

  **Potions can be stacked up to 16**

# For Creative Players
Use the following commands to obtain the items directly:

```
/loot give @s loot dpur:magic_mirror
/loot give @s loot dpur:recall_potion
```


**Delete the old version before installing new versions**
